scores.correctness_notes: Core structure matches gold standard exactly: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active + all_agents_idle lambda. Correctly notes successes parameter and app-name filtering in all_active/all_agents_idle.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout as a settable attribute not mentioned in gold standard; 'delay' parameter in juju.wait() not mentioned in gold standard (may or may not exist); status.apps['my-charm'].status.current access pattern not verified against gold standard — these are plausible but unconfirmed additions
